title: BioRED Biomedical Relation Extraction
description: Schema for biomedical entity and relation extraction from PubMed abstracts, based on the BioRED dataset. Captures typed biomedical entities with database identifiers and document-level relations between entity pairs, including a novelty flag.

entities.description: Biomedical named entities extracted from the text.

text.description: The entity mention text as it appears in the passage.

type.description: The semantic type of the entity.

identifier.description: Database identifier (e.g., MeSH ID, NCBI Gene ID, NCBI Taxonomy ID).

offset.description: Character offset of the entity mention in the full document text.

length.description: Character length of the entity mention.

relations.description: Document-level relations between entity pairs, identified by their database identifiers.

type.description: The semantic relation type between the two entities.

entity1.description: Database identifier of the first entity.

entity2.description: Database identifier of the second entity.

novel.description: Whether this relation is novel (not previously reported in the literature).
